title: pyrethrum lacustre
intro: Pyrethrum lacustre is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and is commonly known as water pyrethrum or lake pyrethrum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pyrethrum lacustre include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antibacterial properties, making it a popular remedy for soothing digestive discomfort and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. Pyrethrum lacustre can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its flowers and leaves can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
